apiKey.description: Cognee API key (or set COGNEE_API_KEY env var)

username.description: Cognee username for login (or set COGNEE_USERNAME env var)

password.description: Cognee password for login (or set COGNEE_PASSWORD env var)

skillsFolder.description: Workspace-relative path to the folder containing SKILL.md skill definitions (default: skills)

datasetName.description: Cognee dataset name for skill storage (default: skills)

autoIngest.description: Automatically ingest skills on startup (default: true)

autoObserve.description: Record agent run outcomes to feed the self-improvement loop (default: true)

autoAmendify.description: Automatically inspect and fix failing skills after runs (default: false)

amendifyMinRuns.description: Minimum failed runs before auto-amendify triggers (default: 3)

amendifyScoreThreshold.description: Runs scoring below this count as failures (default: 0.5)

requestTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for standard API requests in ms (default: 60000)

ingestionTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for skill ingestion requests in ms (default: 300000)
